description: Detects type confusion in C++: reinterpret_cast between unrelated types, unsafe static_cast downcasts, union with typed fields (type-punning risk). Simplified from Rust per D-07: flags new_expression nodes broadly (cannot verify cast target types or union field diversity without deep AST inspection).

flag.message: new expression detected -- verify reinterpret_cast is not used between unrelated types, static_cast pointer downcasts are guarded by dynamic_cast checks, and unions with mixed-type fields use std::variant to prevent undefined behavior from inactive member access
